created_by.description: Filter to summaries triggered by a specific user, identified by `User.uuid`.

date_from.description: Inclusive lower bound on `created_at`, accepts relative shorthand like `-7d`.

date_to.description: Inclusive upper bound on `created_at`, accepts relative shorthand like `-1d`.

distinct_id.description: Filter to summaries for a single user (the session's `distinct_id`).

has_exceptions.description: When true, only summaries that surfaced one or more exception events; when false, only summaries without exceptions.

has_visual_confirmation.description: When true, only summaries produced via the video-based visual-confirmation workflow.

limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

order.description: Ordering field, defaults to `-created_at` (most recent first). Allowed: `created_at`, `session_start_time`, `session_duration` (prefix with `-` for descending).

outcome.description: Filter by the summary's recorded `session_outcome.success` field. `success` for true, `failure` for false, `unknown` for summaries without an outcome.

session_ids.description: Comma-separated list of session IDs to restrict the result to (uses the `(team, session_id)` index).
